name: Fruit Juice Cooler - Gbdp78b
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the bottled water into a large pitcher.
2. Open the can of peach nectar and pour it into the same pitcher.
3. Add half a cup of orange juice to the pitcher.
4. Add one-fourth cup of grapefruit juice to the pitcher.
5. Stir in two tablespoons of lemon juice until well mixed.
6. Fill tall serving glasses with ice cubes.
7. Pour the mixture over the ice in each glass.
8. Serve immediately.
